title: Conflict-free Cooperation Method for Connected and Automated Vehicles at Unsignalized Intersections: Graph-based Modeling and Optimality Analysis
authors: Chaoyi Chen; Qing Xu; Mengchi Cai; Jiawei Wang; Jianqiang Wang; Biao Xu; Keqiang Li
venue: Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies / arXiv version
method_family: Conflict graph + optimal passing order / 冲突图与最优通行顺序
concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。
冲突图与最优通行顺序

section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. PROBLEM STATEMENT
section_map.zh: 把交通交互转写为状态、约束、目标或图结构，是精读时最应复现的部分。
section_map.en: Defines states, constraints, objectives, or graph structures; this is the section to reproduce carefully.

section_map.heading: III. METHODOLOGY
section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: IV. SIMULATION
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

section_map.heading: V. CONCLUSION
section_map.zh: 总结贡献和未来方向，也常暴露作者承认的边界条件。
section_map.en: Summarizes contributions and often reveals author-recognized boundaries.

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Graph conflict modeling + passing order：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. PROBLEM STATEMENT
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 把自然语言交通问题压缩为变量、状态、约束、目标函数或图结构。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Translate the traffic problem into variables, states, constraints, objectives, or graph relations.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 本节是复现论文的核心入口，应与公式“冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective”一起读。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 逐项检查车辆状态、冲突关系、控制输入、时间/空间索引和安全阈值是否定义完整。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 这些建模假设在混合交通、通信延迟、感知误差和高密度车流下是否仍成立？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. METHODOLOGY
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 先依据几何轨迹和时间可达性构建冲突有向图与共存无向图；再用改进深度优先生成树和最小团覆盖等图算法求通行组与顺序；最后由分布式控制保证每辆车按序到达冲突区。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: IV. SIMULATION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：平均延误 (average delay)、总清空时间 (evacuation time)、吞吐量 (throughput)、燃油/能耗代理和停车次数。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. CONCLUSION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 提炼作者承认的边界，并把它转化为博士课题的可拓展问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Convert acknowledged boundaries into research opportunities.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 结论不只是总结结果，更是观察作者没有解决什么的窗口。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把 future work 与前文假设逐一对应，寻找可发表的补强点。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 如果我是审稿人，我会要求补哪一个实验、定理或消融？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：如何把无信号交叉口中复杂的相交、跟驰、合流和分流关系转化为可求解的图排序问题？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：车辆轨迹模板和冲突点可提前计算。；车辆遵守分配的通行顺序，通信近似理想。；主要聚焦纵向控制，横向变道不是核心问题。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Models trajectory conflicts as a conflict directed graph and coexisting undirected graph; solves passing order through improved depth-first spanning tree and minimum clique cover methods.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Strong support for representing intersection conflicts as typed graph relations, similar to the operation graph in this manuscript.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective
Models trajectory conflicts as a conflict directed graph and coexisting undirected graph; solves passing order through improved depth-first spanning tree and minimum clique cover methods.
Conflict-free graph edges represent crossing, diverging, converging, and reachability conflicts before scheduling.
Optimizes evacuation time and average delay, using distributed control to reduce idling near the stop line.
Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.

contribution_matrix.comment: 冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective
Models trajectory conflicts as a conflict directed graph and coexisting undirected graph; solves passing order through improved depth-first spanning tree and minimum clique cover methods.
Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.
Conflict-free graph edges represent crossing, diverging, converging, and reachability conflicts before scheduling.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Strong support for representing intersection conflicts as typed graph relations, similar to the operation graph in this manuscript.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Graph conflict modeling + passing order”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Graph conflict modeling + passing order. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Mostly longitudinal control, ideal communication, and no lane changing in this paper's base formulation.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 如何把无信号交叉口中复杂的相交、跟驰、合流和分流关系转化为可求解的图排序问题？
overview.core_question_en: How can heterogeneous vehicle conflicts at an unsignalized intersection be encoded as graph relations that yield a conflict-free passing order?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Models trajectory conflicts as a conflict directed graph and coexisting undirected graph; solves passing order through improved depth-first spanning tree and minimum clique cover methods.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Conflict-free graph edges represent crossing, diverging, converging, and reachability conflicts before scheduling.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Optimizes evacuation time and average delay, using distributed control to reduce idling near the stop line.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：较强：图建模把交通冲突类型显式化，便于和 JSSP 的机器冲突/工序约束建立同构关系。

methodology.model_name: 冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective
methodology.formula: G=(V,E_d,E_u),\quad \min_{\pi}\; C_{\max}(\pi)=\max_{i\in V} t_i^{out}\quad \text{s.t.}\; (i,j)\in E_d\Rightarrow i\prec_\pi j
symbols: 每辆车对应一个调度实体
表达必须先后通过的约束
表达是否可同批通过或需分组
调度算法的核心决策变量
methodology.algorithm_zh: 先依据几何轨迹和时间可达性构建冲突有向图与共存无向图；再用改进深度优先生成树和最小团覆盖等图算法求通行组与顺序；最后由分布式控制保证每辆车按序到达冲突区。
methodology.algorithm_en: The method builds directed and undirected graph relations from trajectory conflicts, solves groups and orders with graph algorithms, and executes the resulting order via distributed vehicle control.
methodology.stability_zh: 图约束先把不安全组合排除，控制层只需执行已筛选的顺序。实时性取决于图规模和团覆盖求解，但比直接连续优化全车轨迹更结构化。
methodology.stability_en: Safety is front-loaded into graph constraints; tractability improves because the continuous-control layer receives a filtered sequence rather than solving all interactions jointly.
assumptions: 车辆轨迹模板和冲突点可提前计算。
车辆遵守分配的通行顺序，通信近似理想。
主要聚焦纵向控制，横向变道不是核心问题。

experiments.validation: Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.
experiments.baselines: 常见基准包括 FCFS、交通灯控制、无协同控制和其他图排序策略。
experiments.metrics: 平均延误 (average delay)、总清空时间 (evacuation time)、吞吐量 (throughput)、燃油/能耗代理和停车次数。
experiments.ablation: 图关系本身有可解释性，但仍需更系统地拆分：仅有向图、仅无向图、不同团覆盖策略和不同交通流密度下的鲁棒性。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。

figure_table_cues.zh: 冲突关系图 / 通行顺序图
figure_table_cues.reading: 把节点、边类型和先后约束翻译成 JSSP 的作业、机器和析取约束。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 图构造依赖精确几何和预测，异常驾驶会导致边集失真。
团覆盖/排序在大规模密集车流下可能成为瓶颈。
模型偏重全 CAV 场景，对低渗透率混合交通支持不足。
extensions: 把图边类型作为异构图 (heterogeneous graph) 特征，训练 GNN 调度器。
将最小团覆盖与 JSSP disjunctive graph 融合，建立可证明安全的调度层。
引入不确定边权，做分布鲁棒通行排序 (distributionally robust sequencing)。
critique.project_use: Strong support for representing intersection conflicts as typed graph relations, similar to the operation graph in this manuscript.

interactive.response_zh: 边密度升高会减少可并行通行组，通常增大清空时间。
interactive.response_en: Higher edge density reduces parallel passing groups and increases evacuation time.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
